title: TLAPS Safety Proof of MongoRaftReconfig
author: Schultz, William
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Supplementary materials for formal verification of safety of the MongoRaftReconfig protocol in TLAPS, the TLA+ proof system. Includes a formal inductive invariant and a TLAPS proof of the LeaderCompleteness and StateMachineSafety properties. MongoRaftReconfig is a logless dynamic reconfiguration protocol originally designed for MongoDB, a distributed database that uses a log-based replication protocol derived from Raft.
steps_raw: Supplementary materials for formal verification of safety of the MongoRaftReconfig protocol in TLAPS, the TLA+ proof system.
